claims.summary: `anchored_excerpt_with_terms` can shear dense spectral/vibrancy content when caller-provided anchors miss and no pressure fallback term is present.
claims.rationale: Added `HIGH_TEXTURE_CONTINUITY_FALLBACK_TERMS` so density/vibrancy evidence can anchor a bounded excerpt when requested anchors miss.

claims.summary: Late `shadow resonance` or similar anchor language should survive compact continuity extraction.
claims.rationale: `shadow resonance`, spectral entropy, density-gradient, tail-vibrancy, and pressure anchors are already present in continuity anchor sets and covered by focused tests.

claims.summary: `semantic_boundary_before` should choose clean boundaries before the byte cap to prevent mid-word semantic cuts.
claims.rationale: The existing semantic-boundary regression passed and preserves latest clean boundary behavior.
